name: Build a Shopify Store
description: A custom Shopify storefront — theme customization or a full Hydrogen headless storefront

universal.note: These are installed during onboarding, not per-blueprint

blueprint.name: Ruby
blueprint.note: Needed for Shopify theme development (Liquid template engine). macOS ships with Ruby but it may be outdated.

blockers.name: Shopify Account
blockers.reason: You need a Shopify store to develop against — either a live store or a free development store
blockers.resolution: Create a free Shopify Partners account and set up a development store
blockers.note: TWEEBS will guide you through this

authRequirements.name: Shopify Partners Account
authRequirements.note: Free to create. Gives you unlimited development stores for testing. No credit card needed.
authFlow: Create a Shopify Partners account at shopify.com/partners
Create a development store from the Partners dashboard
Run 'shopify auth login' to connect the CLI to your account
TWEEBS verifies auth with 'shopify auth status'

mcpConfigs.name: chrome-devtools
mcpConfigs.userNotice: Chrome will open with your Shopify preview so the team can see the store as they build it. No action needed.

approachSelection.note: The PM asks the user what they need and the architect decides the approach

theme-customization.description: Customize an existing Shopify theme using Liquid, CSS, and JavaScript
theme-customization.bestFor: Users who want a standard Shopify store with custom branding and layout tweaks
theme-customization.stack: Shopify Dawn theme + Liquid + CSS + vanilla JS

hydrogen-storefront.description: Build a fully custom headless storefront with Hydrogen (Shopify's React framework)
hydrogen-storefront.bestFor: Users who want a completely custom shopping experience, unique interactions, or advanced performance

shopify-app.description: Build a Shopify app that adds functionality to the Shopify admin or storefront
shopify-app.bestFor: Users who want to add custom features to Shopify (custom discount logic, integrations, admin tools)
shopify-app.stack: Shopify App + Remix + React + Prisma + TypeScript

initialContext: The user wants to build something with Shopify. Figure out what: Do they want a custom online store (theme customization or headless Hydrogen), or a Shopify app that adds functionality? Ask in plain language — 'Do you want to build a store or add features to an existing store?' and 'How custom does it need to be — branded tweaks to a template, or something completely unique?' The architect will pick the right approach based on the answer.

ticketTemplate.title: Product data and Shopify API integration
Connect frontend to data layer
dependsOn: Product data and Shopify API integration
